blocks.text:
**IMPORTANT: WiFi Numbers are not GHz Bands!**
The WiFi version number (5, 6, 6E, 7) does NOT match the GHz frequency:
- WiFi 5 uses 2.4GHz and 5GHz
- WiFi 6 uses 2.4GHz and 5GHz (NOT 6GHz!)
- WiFi 6E adds 6GHz band
- WiFi 7 uses all three bands (2.4/5/6GHz)

Note: Some WiFi 7 routers do not have 6GHz band - these are not recommended.

**WiFi Standards for Gaming with Virtual Desktop:**
- **WiFi 5 (AC, 2.4/5GHz)** - Minimum required, Max Link: 867 Mbps
- **WiFi 6 (AX, 2.4/5GHz)** - Good performance, Max Link: 1200 Mbps
- **WiFi 6E (AXE, adds 6GHz)** - Best choice, Max Link: 2400 Mbps
- **WiFi 7 (BE, all bands)** - Future-proof, Max Link: 5800 Mbps

Note: 2.4GHz is not supported for gaming but may be suitable for desktop viewing.
